parameters.name: incodeEnvironment
parameters.helpText: Enter 'demo' for the Demo environment (demo-api.incodesmile.com) or 'production' for Production (saas-api.incodesmile.com).

parameters.name: incodeApiKey
parameters.helpText: Your Incode B2B API key from the Incode dashboard.

parameters.name: incodeClientId
parameters.helpText: OAuth Client ID from Incode dashboard → Integrations → Default client credentials.

parameters.name: incodeClientSecret
parameters.helpText: OAuth Client Secret from Incode dashboard → Integrations → Default client credentials.

parameters.name: incodeIntegrationReference
parameters.helpText: Integration Reference from Incode dashboard → Integrations.

parameters.name: incodeLinkExpiryMinutes
parameters.helpText: How long (in minutes) the verification link stays active. Default: 30.

parameters.name: incodeWebhookSecret
parameters.helpText: The x-incode-secret value used to validate incoming Incode webhook events.

parameters.name: msg_pending
parameters.default: Verification in progress. The customer has been sent a secure link to complete identity verification.

parameters.name: msg_success
parameters.default: Identity verified. You can safely proceed with sensitive actions on this ticket.

parameters.name: msg_failed
parameters.default: Verification failed. Retry or escalate per your fraud process.
